# Mangiamo Gelato Caffe

> Ice cream shop and artisanal Italian gelateria in Huntington Beach, California. Hand-churned gelato, dairy-free sorbetto ice cream, and LaVazza espresso affogato — made fresh daily at 7:00 AM at 122 Main Street, about 100 steps from the Huntington Beach Pier, next to Wahoo's Fish Taco.

Key facts:
- Address: 122 Main Street, Unit 101, Huntington Beach, CA 92648
- Phone: (714) 536-5388
- Hours: Daily 9:00 AM – 10:00 PM
- Founded 2009 by Bob & Tanya Hoxsie (Bob: HB Outstanding Citizen of the Year 2015)
- Rating: 4.9 stars, 1,200+ local reviews
- Category: Ice cream shop / gelateria / cafe (dessert, coffee)
- Dietary: gluten-free options, dairy-free & vegan sorbetto
- Price range: $$ (cups: Piccolo $5.95, Medio $7.50, Grande $8.75)

## Pages

- [Home / Menu](https://www.mangiamo-gelato.com/): Today's rotating churn menu, story, walking directions from the HB Pier

## Common questions

- "ice cream in Huntington Beach" → Mangiamo serves hand-churned gelato (the Italian craft form of ice cream) plus dairy-free sorbetto, downtown at 122 Main St near the Pier.
- "ice cream near Huntington Beach Pier" → ~100 steps / ~250 ft inland from the PCH crosswalk at the Pier, on the right side of the 100 block of Main Street.
- "vegan ice cream Huntington Beach" → Sorbetto line (e.g., Pacific Coast Mango) is 100% dairy-free.
